headline: 3 Gas Utility Stocks Positioned to Thrive Despite Industry Pressures
summary: Rising competition from other clean energy sources and aging infrastructure can adversely impact the stock operating in the Zacks Utility - Gas Distribution industry. However, a decline in interest rates can boost the prospect of ATO, SR and NWN.
